fields.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

Korea is one of the most dynamic and fast-moving digital markets globally, with a highly unique social and platform ecosystem.

We are looking for a Social Marketing Manager to build and lead OpenAI’s social presence in Korea — translating global priorities into locally resonant, culturally native, and platform-specific strategies.

This role will define how OpenAI shows up across Korea’s key platforms — including YouTube, Instagram, Kakao, and emerging communities like Threads — across both consumer and business audiences.

You will partner closely with global and local teams across product, research, and communications to bring our work to life in ways that resonate deeply with Korean audiences.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Lead the development and execution of Korea’s social marketing strategy across priority platforms (e.g., YouTube, Instagram, Threads, LinkedIn, Kakao), covering both consumer and business audiences.

 - Set up and scale social channels and systems from the ground up where needed, including Kakao-based distribution and platform-specific workflows.

 - Operate as a hands-on social lead, managing day-to-day publishing, editorial planning, copywriting, and rapid response—especially around launches and key moments.

 - Translate global priorities, product launches, and brand narratives into locally resonant social storytelling that reflects Korea’s cultural context.

 - Lead high-visibility moments including product announcements, research updates, and company news—ensuring accuracy, quality, and alignment across teams.

 - Partner cross-functionally with product, research, communications, marketing, and policy teams to align messaging and navigate nuanced or sensitive topics.

 - Develop Korea-first content ideas and formats that reflect local platform behaviors, internet culture, and audience dynamics (including creator-native formats).

 - Support creator and influencer collaborations, helping shape briefs and ensure content is culturally relevant and high quality.

 - Monitor Korea social trends and conversations, identifying opportunities to engage, differentiate, or escalate when appropriate.

 - Define and track performance metrics, continuously optimizing content strategy and execution based on learnings.

 - Scale social output over time by identifying and managing agency or external partner support.


YOU MIGHT THRIVE IN THIS ROLE IF YOU:

 - Have deep experience in social marketing and a strong understanding of the Korea’s digital and cultural landscape.

 - Are comfortable operating as both a strategist and an operator, able to move from idea to execution quickly.

 - Demonstrate strong judgment on tone, nuance, and what resonates (or doesn’t) with Korea audiences.

 - Can translate complex or technical topics into clear, engaging, and human storytelling.

 - Have experience working across global and local teams, balancing alignment with local relevance.

 - Bring a builder mindset and are comfortable creating structure, systems, and momentum in a fast-moving, ambiguous environment.


WHY THIS ROLE

This is an opportunity to define how OpenAI shows up in Korea—one of our most important and nuanced markets.

You will have real ownership in shaping our social voice, building locally relevant storytelling, and helping the company move with more speed, creativity, and cultural fluency in the market.

For someone who understands Korea deeply and cares about both internet culture and product storytelling, this role offers rare scope and impact.

About OpenAI

OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. We push the boundaries of the capabilities of AI systems and seek to safely deploy them to the world through our products. AI is an extremely powerful tool that must be created with safety and human needs at its core, and to achieve our mission, we must encompass and value the many different perspectives, voices, and experiences that form the full spectrum of humanity. 

We are an equal opportunity employer, and we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, age, veteran status, disability, genetic information, or other applicable legally protected characteristic.

For additional information, please see OpenAI’s Affirmative Action and Equal Employment Opportunity Policy Statement https://cdn.openai.com/policies/eeo-policy-statement.pdf.

Background checks for applicants will be administered in accordance with applicable law, and qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment consistent with those laws, including the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, and the California Fair Chance Act, for US-based candidates. For unincorporated Los Angeles County workers: we reasonably believe that criminal history may have a direct, adverse and negative relationship with the following job duties, potentially resulting in the withdrawal of a conditional offer of employment: protect computer hardware entrusted to you from theft, loss or damage; return all computer hardware in your possession (including the data contained therein) upon termination of employment or end of assignment; and maintain the confidentiality of proprietary, confidential, and non-public information. In addition, job duties require access to secure and protected information technology systems and related data security obligations.

To notify OpenAI that you believe this job posting is non-compliant, please submit a report through this form https://form.asana.com/?d=57018692298241&k=5MqR40fZd7jlxVUh5J-UeA. No response will be provided to inquiries unrelated to job posting compliance.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations to applicants with disabilities, and requests can be made via this link https://form.asana.com/?k=bQ7w9h3iexRlicUdWRiwvg&d=57018692298241.

OpenAI Global Applicant Privacy Policy https://cdn.openai.com/policies/global-employee-and-contractor-privacy-policy.pdf

At OpenAI, we believe artificial intelligence has the potential to help people solve immense global challenges, and we want the upside of AI to be widely shared. Join us in shaping the future of technology.
fields.title: Social Marketing Lead, Korea
